title: Transdisciplinary Research of Identities and Cultures (P6-0461)
summary: Programme group member in the Transdisciplinary Research of Identities and Cultures (P6-0461) research programme at Research Center for Humanities, led by Prof. Dr. Katja Mihurko. Focus on exploring Slovenian culture and identity in the broader Central European and Balkan context.
image_alt: Transdisciplinary Research of Identities and Cultures

title: Historical Interpretations of the 20th Century
summary: Programme group member in the Historical Interpretations of the 20th Century research programme at ZRC SAZU (Research Centre of the Slovenian Academy of Sciences and Arts), led by Prof. Dr. Oto Luthar. Focus on comparative and transnational perspectives on 20th-century history, culture, and literature.
image_alt: Historical Interpretations of the 20th Century programme

title: Sexual desire in Slovenian Women's Writing from a Transnational Perspective (DEWONA)
summary: Project member on the DEWONA ERC Complementary Scheme project examining sexual desire in Slovenian women's writing from transnational and comparative perspectives. Led by Prof. Dr. Katja Mihurko at the University of Nova Gorica. Funded by ARIS (Slovenian Research Agency).

title: Transformations of Intimacy in the Literary Discourse of Slovene 'Moderna'
summary: Project member on the Basic Research Project J6-3134 investigating transformations of intimacy in the literary discourse of Slovene Moderna (the Slovenian modernist period). Led by Prof. Dr. Katja Mihurko, funded by ARIS.

title: Shapes of Shame in Slovenian Literature
summary: Project member on the Basic Research Project J6-60113 examining representations and configurations of shame in Slovenian literature. Led by Assist Prof. Dr. Ivana Zajc, funded by ARIS (Slovenian Research Agency).
image_alt: Shapes of Shame in Slovenian Literature project
